name: Puerco Asado- Cuban Pork Roast
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup orange juice mixed with lime juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Choose any fresh pork roast including Picnic.
2. Trim fat from the roast and pierce some holes on top with a knife.
3. Mash garlic with salt and mix in other ingredients except onions.
4. Rub this mixture onto the roast and insert it into the holes.
5. Place the roast in a plastic bag or glass dish, cover with sliced onions, and refrigerate overnight (or up to 1.5 days).
6. Bake in a covered baking pan at 275°F for 5-6 hours. Lower temperatures work best.
7. Turn the roast once halfway through cooking.
8. Let the roast stand for 20 minutes before carving.
